channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Cyberpunk 2077 Teased For Xbox Game Pass
item.content:encoded:
Melissa McGamepass needs to stop letting her emails leak. Anyway, it appears that Cyberpunk 2077 may be coming to Xbox Game Pass.

The Xbox Game Pass Twitter account recently shared another “leaked” email from the fictional Melissa McGamepass. In the note, a new game coming to the platform was teased. It was said that there are so many breathtaking worlds to explore and that this next Edition would be a “v good one, too,” with the letter V being bolded.

Speculation has begun that the game coming is Cyberpunk 2077, because V is the protagonist’s name. Other emails in the social media team’s inbox include a message from Mortal Kombat’s Johnny Cage asking to become the streaming service’s mascot. The Doom Slayer also shared a message, just an ellipsis.

Recent Shakeups At Xbox

Thankfully, Melissa McGamepass has retained her role as the “Chief Executive Director Chair of Senior Operations & Grand Liaison of Video Game Communications” at Xbox Game Pass. However, Xbox has undergone some very real changes recently. Phil Spencer recently retired. Former Xbox President Sarah Bond resigned from the company. Now, Matt Booty and Asha Sharma are in charge, with Sharma serving as CEO of Microsoft Gaming.

Recent messaging from Sharma has been steady on a recommitment to core Xbox gamers. She’s also shown a desire to create stories that elicit emotional responses from players. Learn more about her plans for Xbox at this link.

Insider Gaming will continue to provide the latest information on all games coming to Xbox Game Pass.

Are you still a Game Pass subscriber? If so, are you hoping to see Cyberpunk 2077 join the lineup? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

https://insider-gaming.com/cyberpunk-2077-teased-for-xbox-game-pass/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Call of Duty Announces Black Ops Royale, a Free Battle Royale Experience
item.content:encoded:
Call of Duty has announced a new Black Ops Royale mode for Call of Duty: Warzone. The news came from the official Call of Duty blog, which outlined plans for the mode and set a debut for Thursday, March 12, at 9 PM PT, or Friday, March 13, at 12 AM ET on the East Coast.

This Blackout-inspired Battle Royale features no Loadouts, Gulag, or Buy Stations. Players will wingsuit in, scavenge, upgrade their weapons, master Cradle Breaches, and outlast 24 squads on Avalon.

100 players form 25 Quad teams and drop into Avalon, with a visible circle marking the shrinking perimeter. This boundary moves at the start of each match, ensuring the entire map is used across different games.

Avalon Is the Big Map in Call of Duty: Warzone

Avalon makes its Warzone debut as the newest large-scale battlefield. The map joins Verdansk, Rebirth Island, and Haven’s Hollow, offering a brighter, more vibrant environment free of Endgame’s red fog.

Avalon features tight city zones, layered interior fights, open routes for quick rotations, and long sightlines ideal for ranged play. It’s also noted that Treyarch has scaled back the map’s water, adding sand paths and new land bridges to connect areas and keep the Battle Royale gameplay smooth.

Learn more about the recent patch to Call of Duty Warzone here.

How do you feel about Warzone’s upcoming mode? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
